features: A treat for your lips - these balms will provide long-lasting hydration.
Super cute & fun themed Lip Balms
Our super nourishing vanilla-scented lip balms leaves your lips 'o so smooth'.
description: Product Description Face Facts Joy Pixels Cupcake Queen Lip Balm is useful for dry, chapped and cracked lips. It also keep your lips fresh and moisturised by applying throughout the day. Flavoured lip balm helps keep your lips moisturised, protected and tasting great all at once. Ingredients Petrolatum, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Paraffinum Liquidum, Synthetic Wax, Ceresin, Caprylic/capric Triglyceride, Microcrystalline Wax, Octyldodecanol, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum, Benzyl Alcohol, Hydroxycitronellal, Benzyl Salicylate, Benzyl Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal. Directions Apply directly to lips as needed Safety Warning May contain allergens. Avoid use if you have known allergies to any of the listed ingredients. See more
